name: UAD Garage Doors Facebook Marketplace Audio Lead Analysis

parameters.name: job_description
parameters.value:
={{ 'LEAD FROM AI CALL ANALYSIS

' + 'Priority: ' + ($json.priority || 'N/A') + '
' + 'Sentiment: ' + ($json.sentiment || 'N/A') + '
' + 'Preferred Time: ' + ($json.appointmentTime || 'Not specified') + '

' + 'Issues: ' + (($json.garageDoorIssues || []).join(', ') || 'N/A') + '

' + 'Key Points: ' + (($json.keyPoints || []).join(', ') || 'N/A') + '

' + 'Action Items: ' + (($json.actionItems || []).join(', ') || 'N/A') }}

parameters.text:
=Analyze this Telnyx conversation insight data and extract lead information.

The input contains conversation insights from Telnyx AI with a summary of the call.

Extract the following from the conversation_insights result field:
- Customer phone number (from the summary or metadata.from field)
- Service address (look for address mentions in the summary)
- Customer name
- Appointment time
- Garage door issues mentioned
- Call outcome

Input data:
{{ JSON.stringify($json, null, 2) }}

**IMPORTANT: You MUST respond with ONLY a valid JSON object matching the schema. No explanations, no markdown code blocks, just the raw JSON.**

assignments.name: emailBody

parameters.formDescription: Upload your WAV audio file to get AI-powered transcription and analysis
